Career

Timeline

Eight-plus years building and operating backend systems — communication platforms, search and reconciliation, and email infrastructure at scale.

  1. 2024 — presentnow

    Senior Software Engineer II

    Apollo.io · Remote

    Working on sales engagement workflows with a focus on email deliverability, connectivity, sequences, and internal AI tooling. Promoted to Senior Software Engineer II in April 2026.

    focusemail deliverability · sales engagement · sequences · internal AI tooling
    stackruby · rails · postgresql · redis · mongodb · elasticsearch
  2. 2023 — 2024

    Senior Software Engineer

    Snapdeal | AceVector Group · Gurugram, Haryana, India

    Led outbound communication systems across Email, SMS, App, and WhatsApp; managed A/B testing; and enhanced chatbot functionalities.

    focuschatbot · notifications · A/B experiments
    stackjava · spring · kafka · mysql · redis
  3. 2021 — 2023

    Software Engineer II

    Snapdeal | AceVector Group · Gurugram, Haryana, India

    Built features for chatbot conversations and managed all outbound communication flows. Participated in A/B experimentation initiatives.

    focuschatbot · notifications · experimentation
    stackjava · spring boot · kafka · redis
  4. 2021

    Software Engineer

    Nomura Research Institute Financial Technologies India Pvt. Ltd. · Kolkata, West Bengal, India

    Led client onboarding with data migration workflows and implemented Single Sign-On (SSO) for enhanced security and user management.

    focusdata migration · SSO · access control
    stackjava · spring · mysql
  5. 2020 — 2021

    Associate Software Engineer - II

    Nomura Research Institute Financial Technologies India Pvt. Ltd. · Kolkata, West Bengal, India

    Created EOD reconciliation reports using Solr and worked with the Global Delivery team catering to the Australian market.

    focusreconciliation · reporting · global delivery
    stackjava · solr
  6. 2018 — 2020

    Associate Software Engineer - I

    Nomura Research Institute Financial Technologies India Pvt. Ltd. · Kolkata, West Bengal, India

    Key contributor to the DAML Centre of Excellence; modeled business flows using Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT).
